Overview ‚Å¢

One standout feature of the CRBN Power Series is its unibody design. Unlike other paddles that have a weak joint where the handle meets the face, this design makes the paddle more durable and responsive. Review 1

Review 2

‚ÄúI am approaching a 4.0 level. I was a tennis player for over 35 years so some shots feel very comfortable. My 18k seems to have lost its pop so bought the CRBN x3. Played with it last night for the ‚Äåfirst time, wow! I am very impressed ‚Å¢with the extra pop and great ‚Äåspin especially with a backhand slice! Control was‚Äç very good. ‚Å¢I chose the 14mm which was lighter and quicker to maneuver at the nvz. I highly recommend this paddle :-)‚Äù

Review 3

‚ÄúPaddle has ‚Äågood spin and great pop at the‚Å§ net ‚Äåalong with power. I ‚Å¢think that control could be‚Äå an issue‚Å§ if you aren‚Äôt using any topspin, you may have‚Äç to adjust.‚Äù

Review 4

‚ÄúI ‚Å§am really‚Å£ enjoying the paddle so far. ‚ÄåI upgraded‚Å¢ from the Onix Z5,‚Å£ and they play very similarly (I had‚Äå my ‚ÄçZ5 weighted). It‚Äôs a little better at everything than the Z5. More power, more spin, ‚Äçbetter sweet‚Äã spot. So kudos to the Z5 in terms of value. But in terms of a top-of-the-line, power-oriented paddle,‚Äç I recommend the ‚Å£CRBN power series for sure.‚Äù

‚ÄúThis ‚Äãpaddle allows me to have‚Å£ confidence and control‚Å§ and has now permeated into multiple dimensions of my life. It‚Äôs paradoxically ‚Äçlight and heavy at the same time. Ying ‚Äãyang if you know what I ‚Äçmean. Light with‚Å£ soft touch at the kitchen. But strong and sure for long and driving game. It‚Å£ has a ‚Å§nice neoprene cover that keeps‚Äã it warm. The grip fits me like a life long prosthetic. I like that it is dark and not‚Äç white like Joola paddles I have. I can get it dirty and it doesn‚Äôt look nasty. Review 6

‚ÄúThis paddle is amazing for power and spin. I am still getting used to‚Å¢ it ‚Å§and it has‚Å§ improved my game. Pros & Cons

Pros

1. Expanded sweet‚Äç spot‚Å¢ for improved shot ‚Äãconsistency
2. Carbon fiber material for increased‚Å§ spin and power

4. Ergonomic grip for comfortable play
5. Includes neoprene paddle‚Å£ cover for protection

Cons

Q&A

Q: What makes the‚Äå CRBN Power Series Pickleball Paddle stand out from other paddles on the market?

A: The CRBN Power Series Pickleball Paddle is crafted‚Äã from carbon fiber, which not only provides impressive spin on the ball but also creates a massive sweet ‚Äãspot for the perfect balance of power‚Äã and control. Our unibody design sets us apart from other brands, ensuring a more ‚Äåresponsive and durable paddle with an ergonomic grip.

Q: Can you tell us more about the dimensions and weight of the paddle?

A: The CRBN Power Series‚Å¢ Pickleball Paddle has a length of 16.5 inches and a width of 7.5 inches, with a core thickness of ‚Äç14mm. The handle length is 5.25 inches, with a grip circumference ‚Äçof 4.25 inches. The paddle weighs in at 7.8-8.1 ounces, making it a lightweight yet ‚Äåpowerful choice ‚Äãfor pickleball players.

Q: Does the CRBN Power Series Pickleball Paddle come with any additional ‚Äçaccessories?

A:‚Å§ Yes, every CRBN Paddle comes with‚Å£ a Neoprene Paddle Cover to protect it‚Å£ when not in use. For even more durability, we recommend using our paddle eraser ‚Å§(search ‚ÄúCRBN eraser‚Äù) to keep your paddle looking brand new for longer.

Q: How ‚Äãdoes the expanded sweet spot of‚Å£ the CRBN Power Series Pickleball Paddle enhance ‚Äçgameplay?

A: The redesigned internal‚Å£ composition of the 3X Power series paddle creates an expanded sweet spot, helping to eliminate vibration and improve shot consistency and ‚Å£control on the court. The carbon fiber construction of the paddle ensures‚Äã a powerful‚Å¢ yet precise performance‚Å¢ that players of all levels will appreciate. ‚Äã
